title: Fix reverse_words() to reverse word order
body:
## Problem

In `reverse_bug/textutil.py`, `reverse_words(text)` should reverse the order of whitespace-separated words, not reverse every character.

`reverse_words("hello world")` should return `"world hello"`, not `"dlrow olleh"`.

## Expected

`return " ".join(text.split()[::-1])`

## Acceptance

All tests in `tests/test_textutil.py` pass.
notes: Local string-handling bug for offline eval.
